items.title: Awesome Claude Skills — Open Source Library
items.summary: A curated open-source GitHub repository of production-ready Claude skills you can copy-paste into your workflow. Covers document generation (PDF, DOCX, PPT, CSV, Markdown), web scraping & automation, data processing pipelines, and API integrations. No need to build Claude building blocks from scratch.
items.content:
## What's inside

1. **Document Generation** — PDFs, DOCX, PPT, CSV, Markdown. One prompt → structured formatted output.
2. **Web Scraping & Automation** — Extract structured data, clean & normalize, schedule workflows, trigger automations.
3. **Data Processing Pipelines** — Parse raw files, transform datasets, run analysis, generate summaries.
4. **API Integrations** — Connect SaaS tools, push/pull structured data, automate reporting, chain multi-step workflows.

**Repo:** https://github.com/BehiSecc/awesome-claude-skills

items.title: 9 Claude Opus 4.6 + Figma Make Prompts to Build a $5,000 Website in 2 Hours — Tauhid IQ
items.summary: A Facebook post by Tauhid IQ sharing 9 structured prompts for building professional client websites using Claude Opus 4.6 (architecture and logic) paired with Figma Make (pixel-perfect UI and deployment). The workflow was tested on 100+ prompts and reportedly produced a $5,000 client site in 118 minutes. Prompts cover the full build pipeline: architecture strategy, design system, conversion copy, component logic, and Figma-optimized prompt engineering.
items.content:
## Stack
- **Claude Opus 4.6** — architecture, logic & complex reasoning
- **Figma Make** — pixel-perfect UI, interactions & deployment

## The 9 Prompts

1. **Architecture Strategist** — You are a Principal Architect at Vercel. Build a [WEBSITE TYPE]. Delivers: site map, 3 user flows, data models, API requirements, 30+ component inventory, page templates, tech stack rec, performance budgets, SEO structure.

2. **Design System Generator** — You are Apple's Design Director. Create a system for [BRAND] with [MINIMAL/BOLD/LUXURY/PLAYFUL] attributes. Delivers: color palette (primary/secondary/semantic/dark mode), 9-level typography scale, 8px spacing grid, 30 component specs, animation guidelines, WCAG AA. Exports: design tokens (JSON), CSS variables, Figma-ready descriptions.

3. **Content Architect** — You are Ogilvy's Conversion Copywriter. Write all copy for [WEBSITE TYPE]. Per page: hero (6w headline, 15w subhead, CTA), 3 feature blocks, social proof + stats, 8-item FAQ, footer. Uses emotional triggers + power words with H1/H2/body tags.

4. **Component Logic Builder** — You are a Frontend Architect. Design logic for: multi-step form (validation, progress, states), dynamic pricing calculator (real-time), search with filters (faceted, sort, pagination), user dashboard (viz, CRUD), auth flow (login/signup/reset). Per component: state machine diagram, data flow, error handling, loading/empty states, edge cases. Output React structure.

5. **Figma Make Prompt Engineer** — Convert technical spec from Claude into 5 Figma Make prompts. Each prompt: starts with outcome, includes brand context (colors, typography, mood), specifies interactions (hover, click, scroll, animate), defines responsive behavior, requests specific sections (hero, features, CTA, footer).

6–9. (Additional prompts not fully loaded in post)

items.title: 10 Grok Prompts That Feel Like Cheating — Thedigitalkinggg
items.summary: A Facebook post by Thedigitalkinggg sharing 10 high-leverage Grok prompts covering: savage red-team plan critique, content repurposing into 25 platform-native assets, brutal decision-making razor, faceless video generation chain, cold outreach 5-message sequence, weekly output autopsy, anti-overthinking kill switch, daily high-output batch producer, and a future-self regret minimizer for 2030. Each prompt is fill-in-the-bracket format and designed to produce immediate, actionable results.
items.content:
## The 10 Prompts

1. **Burn My Plan Alive — Red-Team Roast** — savage zero-filter critic rates viability 1–10, destroys weaknesses, gives highest-leverage pivot
2. **10× Content Repurposing Nuclear Bomb** — turn 1 piece into 25 platform-native assets (X, LinkedIn, IG, newsletter, YouTube Shorts, cold DMs)
3. **One-Shot Brutal Life / Business Decision Razor** — worst outcome probability, 60-second gun-to-head decision, micro-action in <15 min
4. **Grok Image + Video Frame Chain** — full faceless 60s Reels/TikTok: hook, 12 image prompts, voiceover, text overlays, CapCut assembly
5. **Cold Outreach Message Nuclear Bomb** — 5-message DM/LinkedIn sequence + 5 search queries to find 50 perfect targets
6. **Weekly Momentum & Anti-Stagnation Autopsy** — celebrate needle-movers, identify time thieves, 3 micro-experiments, this week's leverage focus
7. **Anti-Overthinking Kill Switch** — worst outcome probability, 60-second decision, one tiny action in <15 min
8. **Daily High-Leverage Output Batch** — 7 ready-to-ship pieces: X post, LinkedIn, video script, cold DM opener, email opener, micro-content, anti-procrastination sentence
9. **Future-Self Regret Minimizer (2030)** — what mattered most, biggest time waste, key choices, one sentence from 2030 you
10. Plug for AI Creator University ($9/month community)

items.title: Claude Code in Action — Anthropic Official Course
items.summary: Anthropic's official structured course on integrating Claude Code into professional development workflows. Covers 8 competency areas: coding assistant architecture, multi-step tool use, context management, visual communication, custom slash commands and automation, MCP server integration, GitHub workflow automation (automated code review), and thinking/planning modes for varying problem complexity. Requires basic CLI and Git familiarity.
items.content:
## Course Modules
1. Coding Assistant Architecture
2. Tool Use System (multi-step tasks)
3. Context Management
4. Visual Communication (images + planning)
5. Custom Automation (slash commands, hooks)
6. MCP Server Integration
7. GitHub Workflow Integration (automated code review)
8. Thinking/Planning Modes

**Prerequisites:** CLI familiarity, basic Git

Includes a stack builder to compose custom AI development setups and an NPM package to install configs directly.

items.title: Claude Code — Anthropic's CLI for Claude
items.summary: Claude Code is Anthropic's official command-line tool that brings Claude directly into your terminal. It can edit files, run commands, search code, and perform agentic tasks across your entire codebase. Designed for software engineers who want AI assistance without leaving the terminal.

items.title: Prompt Engineering Guide
items.summary: A comprehensive, community-driven guide covering prompt engineering techniques from basic to advanced. Topics include chain-of-thought prompting, few-shot learning, ReAct, and more. Essential reference for anyone building with LLMs.

items.title: 12 LLM Prompts to Land a Job Faster (Career Coach Prompts)
items.summary: A viral Facebook post by Thedigitalkinggg sharing 12 ready-to-use LLM prompts that act as a personal career coach. Covers the full job search pipeline: ATS resume rewrite, LinkedIn profile overhaul, tailored cover letters, cold outreach templates, behavioral interview prep with STAR answers, salary negotiation scripts, mock interview simulation, and a weekly job search tracker. Each prompt is fill-in-the-bracket format — paste into ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini and replace [brackets] with your info.
items.content:
## The 12 Prompts

1. **How-to setup** — chain prompts in the same chat for best context
2. **ATS resume rewrite & keyword sniper** — scores your resume 1–10, pulls top keywords from job postings, rewrites every bullet with quantified achievements
3. **LinkedIn headline & About overhaul** — magnetic headline, 4–6 line About section, top skills, post ideas, personal brand statement
4. **Tailored cover letter generator** — 300–400 words, hooks with company-specific detail, quantified proof, exact job description keywords
5. **Cold outreach templates** — LinkedIn connect note, DM, cold email, and follow-up; all warm and non-spammy
6. **Behavioral interview predictor + STAR answers** — 12 likely questions, full STAR answers from your real experience, weak-spot coaching
7. **Salary negotiation script** — market rate research, negotiation email + call script, pushback handlers, walk-away line
8. **Weekly job search tracker** — performance coach review: what worked, what wasted time, this week's focus, micro-experiments
9. **LinkedIn content batch** — 7 ready-to-post updates to attract inbound recruiter messages
10. **Mock interview simulator** — full 20–30 min mock, one question at a time, honest feedback + score per answer, hire/no-hire verdict
11–12. (Additional prompts in thread)

items.title: Stanford CS336: Language Modeling from Scratch — Free on YouTube
items.summary: Stanford's CS336 course on building language models from scratch is now freely available on YouTube. The course covers transformer architecture, tokenization, pretraining, fine-tuning, and RLHF — all implemented from the ground up. Ideal for engineers who want a rigorous, hands-on understanding of how LLMs actually work under the hood.

items.title: OpenAI's 11 Free Prompt Engineering Courses

Courses include: Introduction to Prompt Engineering, Advanced Prompt Engineering, ChatGPT 101, ChatGPT Projects, ChatGPT & Reasoning, Multimodality Explained, ChatGPT Search, LLM fundamentals, Introduction to GPTs, ChatGPT for Data Analysis, and Deep Research. Each is self-paced and designed for both beginners and experienced practitioners.
items.content:

1. Introduction to Prompt Engineering
2. Advanced Prompt Engineering
3. ChatGPT 101

6. Multimodality Explained
